partner-headline: Partnerships that turn discovery into relevant demand
partner-intro: AJSEE is where people discover events and plan their free time. We help ticketing partners, promoters, and other relevant brands reach audiences at the moment of inspiration. We build on fair collaboration that respects your customer relationship and your own sales journey.
partner-benefit1-desc: People interested in culture, sport, and travel for experiences.
partner-benefit2-desc: High-quality presentation of your events and offers in a modern and clear environment.
partner-benefit3-desc: We link directly to your sales or reservation system.
partner-benefit4-desc: Transactions and the customer relationship remain fully under your control.
partners-description: Our platform is open to collaboration with cultural institutions, cities, producers and tech partners. Below are examples of typical organizations that can work with us.
partner-focus-title: What types of partnerships we are currently developing
partner-focus-intro: Today, AJSEE is primarily developing partnerships in ticket sales and accommodation connected to travel for experiences. At the same time, we are open to other collaborations that naturally fit how AJSEE works and bring clear value to the user.
partner-focus-item-1-text: Partners for concerts, theatre, festivals and sports events.
partner-focus-item-2-text: Partners who complement experiences with meaningful accommodation options and trip planning.
partner-focus-item-3-text: Partners relevant to travel for experiences and leisure planning.
partner-focus-item-4-text: Collaborations that support event discovery, offer distribution or higher-quality content.
partner-collaboration-intro: Every partner has slightly different needs. That is why we look for a form of collaboration that makes sense for both your offer and AJSEE users. Sometimes it is a simple link to tickets or accommodation, other times it can be a thematic page, curated recommendations, or a deeper technical integration.
partner-collaboration-item-1-text: The user discovers the event with us and completes the purchase directly with you.
partner-collaboration-item-2-text: We can place your offer into a specific theme, city, season, or type of experience.
partner-collaboration-item-3-text: We can help present your offer in a context that feels natural for the user and supports their leisure planning.
partner-collaboration-item-4-text: For selected partnerships, we can work with a data feed, API, or another partner technical interface so that the offer on AJSEE is accurate, up to date, and well connected to the next steps.
partner-process-intro: AJSEE is at an early stage and we are building partnerships step by step. We are looking for collaborations that naturally connect with the world of events, travel and leisure. We are not trying to build the longest possible list of partners, but meaningful connections that make sense for users, partners and the further development of AJSEE.
partner-process-step-1-text: We briefly discuss mutual expectations and where the collaboration can create value for both sides.
partner-process-step-2-text: Together, we clarify which form of involvement is the best fit for the specific partnership.
partner-process-step-3-text: We prepare the content, links or technical setup on the AJSEE side and connect them to the partner’s materials or solution.
partner-process-step-4-text: After launch, we monitor how users respond to the collaboration — for example through interest in the offer, clicks or feedback. This allows us to gradually refine the collaboration and better adapt it to what actually works.
partner-process-note: AJSEE helps users discover the offer and make a better decision. The actual purchase or reservation then takes place directly with the partner.
partner-value-title: What do you gain by partnering with us?
partner-value-intro: AJSEE helps partners reach audiences exactly at the moment when they are looking for inspiration for their free time. Our goal is not just to redirect users, but to present your offer in a context that gives them clear value.
partner-value-item-1-text: Your events or services appear to users at the moment when they are actively deciding how to spend their free time in a meaningful way.
partner-value-item-2-text: From AJSEE, we guide users directly to your sales or reservation channel. The entire purchase or registration process remains fully under your control and follows your rules.
partner-value-item-3-text: We place your offer organically into curated selections and recommendations. This helps users understand the added value of your service in a broader context.
partner-value-item-4-text: The partnership can be built gradually — from simple first steps to more complex development and new opportunities based on real results.
partner-contact-intro: We are looking for partners with whom we can help create a world full of inspiration. If you believe your offer could be relevant for AJSEE users, we would be happy to hear from you. Let’s explore the mutual value of working together.
partner-placeholder-company: E.g. the name of your company or project
partner-placeholder-message: Briefly describe your offer or vision for how we could connect.
partner-success-msg: Great! We have received your message and will get back to you soon.
